name: 8-Bit Orbit
description: Pixel-arcade CRT — a dark-void starfield, neon-cyan primary, chunky Tektur display + Space Mono HUD labels, hard rectangular pixel shapes and a hard-offset pixel shadow. Retro-game energy.
descriptionZh: 像素街机 CRT——暗黑星空场、霓虹青主色、粗壮 Tektur 标题 + Space Mono 界面标签、硬边像素形状与硬投影。复古游戏能量。
bestFor: Retro-game / arcade / playful-tech topics — 8-bit pixel energy, high-contrast neon-on-void.
